Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This is a ridiculous amount of burgers.[n]I wonder if I'll be able to finish everything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}No matter how much I eat, the amount[n]of burgers doesn't seem to decrease...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Eating while staring off into the distance[n]made me feel a little better...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Instead of flavor, each bite only brings more[n]pain... I don't think I can finish everything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I'm making progress, but[n]I shouldn't get ahead of myself...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Working through the pain, I managed to[n]maintain my pace without stopping...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My stomach hurts... I lost pace and[n]I can't seem to get back on track...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the final stretch... How can I keep[n]this up and complete the challenge...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Imagining eating something sour instead[n]helped me maintain my pace...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My stomach feels like it's going to burst...[n]It seems like I'm not making any progress.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I managed to eat the mountain of burgers...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Pacing, technique, and mental fortitude[n]were all required. I feel like I've grown...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can now order the limited Weekend[n]Wilduck Set when it's available![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}First, I should report back to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...I couldn't eat it all. I'll have to[n]try again some other time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Although I couldn't finish it, I feel like[n]I've grown just by taking the challenge...[n]{f 1 1}
